name: Fantasy Creature Jigsaws
short_description: Piece together beautiful pictures of fantastical creatures. Dragons, Goblins, Manticores and more. Casual relaxing and satisifying.
detailed_description:
Fantasy Creature Jigsaws features 50 beautiful puzzles themed around 10 categories of creatures Dragons, Goblins, Manticores, Vampires, Unicorns, Elves, Sea Monsters, Dwarfs, Fairies, and the Undead.

  • Each puzzle is timed, offering an engaging experience as you race against the clock, earning Bronze, Silver or Gold Medals for beating par times.

  • Puzzles get larger as you progress within each category adding to the challenge.

  • Push your skills further with the addition of hard mode which removes the puzzle outline.

  • Earn achievements for every puzzle you complete and use cloud saves to effortlessly transfer your progress between devices.

Immerse yourself in the magical world of fantasy creatures and test your puzzle-solving skills!
